name: Liz's Proxy
description: OpenAI-compatible API proxy with device fingerprinting key generation

TARGET_API_URL.description: Target API URL to proxy requests to

TARGET_API_KEY.description: API key for the target service (can be set via admin dashboard)

MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Maximum completion tokens per response (stops long outputs)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL (optional, uses SQLite if not set)

PORT.description: Port to run the server on

MAX_KEYS_PER_IP.description: Max API keys allowed per IP (abuse protection, 1-20)

SESSION_SECRET.description: Secret for signing session cookies (auto-generated if not set)
